title: Leptochilus heudelotii
taxonomy: Leptochilus heudelotii is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern, meaning it grows on other plants, such as trees. Within the Polypodiaceae family, Leptochilus heudelotii is classified in the genus Leptochilus. This genus is part of the order Polypodiales, which includes many species of ferns. The classification of Leptochilus heudelotii is further refined by its specific placement within the plant kingdom.
uses: I can find information regarding the plant Leptochilus heudelotii.
